title: SCAPE-APA: a package for estimating alternative polyadenylation events from scrna-seq data
author: Cheng, Lu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: SCAPE-APA is a Python software package designed to detect alternative polyadenylation events from single-cell RNA sequencing data. It uses advanced bioinformatics and computational tools to make the analysis process faster and more efficient. SCAPE-APA is also available on the Python Package Index (PyPi) website, making it easy to install.
steps_raw: SCAPE-APA is a Python software package designed to detect alternative polyadenylation events from single-cell RNA sequencing data. It uses advanced bioinformatics and computational tools to make the analysis process faster and more efficient. SCAPE-APA is also available on the Python Package Index (PyPi) website, making it easy to install.
